payload.answer: I can’t inspect memory mem_123 because no memory store or memory record data is available in this context.

entity_resolution.reason: No memory backend or record contents were provided for mem_123, so the memory cannot be inspected.

details: Requested inspection of memory ID mem_123.
No backend access or memory payload was available.

repair_options: Provide the contents/metadata of mem_123 to inspect it.
Run the inspect command in an environment with access to the Brain memory backend.
